symbols.note: top premium; also acts as the free-spins vault key-marking symbol
base-game wild (pyramid); substitutes all but scatter; 25x total bet for 5-of-a-kind; observed on reels 2-4
free-spins-only gold coin 'WILD x2'; carries x2 multiplier that applies to any winning way it joins; multiple multipliers multiply together; each landed wild adds a random value to the Vault meter
lotus flower; 3/4/5 scatters pay 1x/5x/25x total bet and trigger 10 free spins; during free spins 3/4/5 scatters add 10x/50x/250x to the Vault

paytable.unit: total-bet-multiplier-per-way (estimated; card ranks pay ~2-3x, premiums ~3.5-5x, wild 25x for 5-of-a-kind per market research)

features.trigger: 3, 4, or 5 SCATTER (lotus) symbols anywhere on a base spin
features.behavior: Awards a fixed 10 free spins regardless of trigger count (3/4/5 scatters instead pay 1x/5x/25x total bet and set/expand the initial Vault). During free spins the WILD MULTIPLIER symbol appears on all reels carrying x2, and the Vault key-collection mechanic is active. Night-scene transition with 'CONGRATULATIONS! YOU HAVE WON 10 FREE SPINS' banner.

features.trigger: WILD MULTIPLIER (gold coin 'WILD x2') lands during free spins
features.behavior: Free-spins-exclusive wild that substitutes all but scatter; multiplies the winning combination passing through it by x2. When multiple wild multipliers join one winning combo their multipliers multiply together (two x2 = x4). Applied and displayed in the same win-evaluation step as the base pay. Each landed wild multiplier also adds a random value to the Vault meter.

features.trigger: Free spins active; fill all 20 key positions on the middle three reels (reels 2-4) by the end of the round
features.behavior: Vault meter starts at 20x total bet at the start of free spins and grows as wild multipliers (random contribution up to the 12,500x cap) and scatters (3/4/5 add 10x/50x/250x) land. The first free spin marks 8 random positions on reels 2-4; each Cleopatra symbol that lands marks additional positions. If all 20 positions are marked when free spins end, the accumulated Vault value is paid on top of regular wins; otherwise the Vault is forfeited (all-or-nothing). Observed vault progression 14/20-20/20 across rounds; 20/20 completion coincided with a MEGA! tier win.

features.trigger: Player purchase from the BUY FEATURE button
features.behavior: Costs 30x total bet ($60.00 at the $2.00 test bet). Opens a confirmation modal then a CONFIRM BUY dialog; on confirm, guarantees exactly 3 scatters land on the triggering spin and proceeds identically to a natural free-spins trigger (10 spins, Vault starting at 20x total bet). RTP with Buy Free Spins is 96.56%.

winTiers.label: NICE!
winTiers.note: mid-tier full-screen banner with winged-Cleopatra overlay and sparkle particles

winTiers.label: MEGA!
winTiers.note: higher tier full-screen banner with radiant burst and coin-particle rain; highest tier observed — ladder above MEGA! unconfirmed

anticipation.scatter: blue glow highlight on scatter cells; near-miss when high symbols stack on non-adjacent reels breaks the ways chain

presentation.notes: Reel grid centered-left in an ornate gold Egyptian temple frame; static Cleopatra character beside reels; gold-frame + sparkle highlight on winning cells; WIN counter roll-up; turbo/quick-spin with motion blur. No cascade/tumble mechanic (confirmed absent).

audio.notes: Only the existence of Ambient Music and Sound FX toggle controls was confirmed; actual audio behavior not captured/verified.

estimationMethod.math.hitFrequency: Estimated by analogy: classic Cleopatra 20-line hit rate ~35.8% (casino.guru math), uplifted for 1024-ways structure to ~40-50% per market research; no exact figure in evidence.
estimationMethod.math.paytable: Per-symbol pay values estimated from market-research five-of-a-kind ranges (card ranks 2-3x, premiums 3.5-5x, wild 25x) and observed sample pays; exact per-way table not shown in paytable screenshots.
estimationMethod.math.weights: Reel strips / symbol weights are proprietary and not present in any evidence; not derivable.
